Hero.title: The Road to Success
Hero.subtitle: The right place to reach your target high school in LGS.
Hero.headline: We Chart the Path to Your Goal Together
Hero.slogan: We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

HeroMain.subtitle: With our strong school preparation program for 4th, 5th, 6th and 7th graders and to reach your target high school in LGS — the right address. We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

5-sinif.title: 5th Grade
5-sinif.description: 1 weekend day + 1 weekday. 10-12 lesson hours/week. Extra study sessions, one-on-one Q&A and guidance support.
5-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation in 5th grade is the key to LGS success.
5-sinif.intro: Students attend 1 weekend day and 1 weekday.
5-sinif.body: Students attend 1 weekend day and 1 weekday. Core subjects on Saturday. Total 10-12 lesson hours per week. Extra weekly problem-solving study sessions. One-on-one question solving with teachers. Students can reach teachers anytime. Guidance unit conducts recognition and attention tests. Emotional and psychological status is reported. Achievement graphs are recorded in the digital app. Students reinforce learning with next-generation questions. Exam preparation, LGS exam introduction, complementary school education, reading activities, attention improvement, reading comprehension, and test technique development.
5-sinif.phase1_text: Core subjects on Saturday. Extra weekly study sessions and one-on-one Q&A support.
5-sinif.tech_tools: Weekly study sessions · One-on-one Q&A · Guidance · Attention tests
5-sinif.meta_title: 5th Grade Program | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
5-sinif.meta_description: 10-12 hour per week program with one-on-one Q&A and guidance support for 5th grade students.

6-sinif.title: 6th Grade
6-sinif.description: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. One-on-one Q&A, guidance support, 7-day library and camp programs.
6-sinif.hero_quote: Every step in 6th grade brings you closer to your LGS goal.
6-sinif.intro: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays.
6-sinif.body: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. Extra weekly problem-solving study sessions. One-on-one question solving with teachers. Students can reach teachers anytime. Library available 7 days 08:30–19:00. Guidance unit conducts recognition and attention tests. Emotional and psychological status is reported. Achievement graphs are recorded in the digital app. Students reinforce learning with next-generation questions. Exam preparation, LGS exam introduction, complementary school education, reading activities, attention improvement, reading comprehension, and test technique development. Camp programs available.
6-sinif.phase1_text: 2 weekend + 2 weekday lessons. Extra weekly study sessions and one-on-one Q&A. Library 7 days 08:30–19:00.
6-sinif.phase2_text: Recognition and attention tests applied. Emotional and psychological status reported. Achievement graphs recorded in digital app.
6-sinif.phase3_text: Exam prep, LGS introduction, reading activities, attention improvement, reading comprehension and test technique development. Camp programs.
6-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and confident continuation of the LGS process.
6-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. 7-day library (08:30–19:00).
6-sinif.tech_tools: Weekly study sessions · One-on-one Q&A · 7-day library · Guidance · Attention tests
6-sinif.meta_title: 6th Grade Program | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
6-sinif.meta_description: 14 lesson hours/week with one-on-one Q&A, 7-day library and guidance support for 6th grade students.

7-sinif.title: 7th Grade
7-sinif.description: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. Individual guidance, 7-day library (08:30–19:00) and camp programs.
7-sinif.hero_quote: 7th grade is the critical year when the foundations of LGS success are laid.
7-sinif.intro: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays.
7-sinif.body: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. Extra study sessions and one-on-one Q&A. Teachers available anytime via the student platform. Weekly individual guidance sessions with personalized study plans, monitored by guidance unit and reported to parents. Library available 7 days 08:30–19:00. Vocational tests and attention tests for each student. Student assessment exam and level determination. Individual study plan prepared by guidance unit. Reinforcement with next-generation questions. Exam prep, LGS adaptation, test technique development, academic performance improvement, LGS mock exams, high school visits, speed reading, comprehension and attention improvement. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
7-sinif.phase1_text: 2 weekend + 2 weekday lessons. Study sessions and one-on-one teacher support. Library available 7 days 08:30–19:00.
7-sinif.phase2_text: Weekly individual guidance, personal study plan and weekly parent updates. Vocational and attention tests.
7-sinif.phase3_text: LGS mock exams, high school visits, speed reading and attention activities. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
7-sinif.result_text: Enter LGS with strong preparation and take confident steps toward the target high school.
7-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 hours. 7-day library (08:30–19:00).
7-sinif.tech_tools: One-on-one Q&A · 7-day library (08:30-19:00) · Individual guidance · Camp programs
7-sinif.meta_title: 7th Grade Program | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
7-sinif.meta_description: 14 lesson hours/week with individual guidance, 7-day library and comprehensive LGS prep for 7th graders.

8-sinif.title: 8th Grade
8-sinif.description: 2 weekend days + 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. 1 mock/week (3/week in last 3 months), Baykuş library and individual guidance.
8-sinif.hero_quote: 8th grade is the year your LGS goal becomes reality.
8-sinif.intro: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays.
8-sinif.body: Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. One-on-one Q&A with teachers. Teachers available anytime via platform. Weekly mock exam with post-exam analysis and personalized question bank. 3 mock exams/week in the last 3 months before LGS. Baykuş library program for evening study with teacher supervision. Weekly individual guidance and parent updates. Library 7 days 09:00–19:00. Attention and motivation activities. LGS mock exams with AI-powered (XYS) analysis and personalized question banks. Weekly individual plan prepared and monitored by guidance unit. Exam prep, quality high school visits, goal setting, motivation, reading comprehension and speed reading. Coaching for improving exam scores. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
8-sinif.phase1_text: 2 weekend + 2 weekday lessons. One-on-one Q&A. Baykuş library for evening study. Library 7 days 09:00–19:00.
8-sinif.phase2_text: 1 mock/week (3/week in last 3 months). AI-powered (XYS) analysis and personalized question bank creation after each exam.
8-sinif.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, parent updates, quality high school visits. Motivation activities, goal setting, summer and holiday camps.
8-sinif.result_text: Score high in LGS and get into the target high school.
8-sinif.tech_title: 14 lesson hours/week · 1 mock/week (3/week last 3 months) · AI Analysis
8-sinif.tech_intro: 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 hours. Weekly mock exams and AI-powered analysis.
8-sinif.tech_tools: One-on-one Q&A · Baykuş library · Weekly mock exam · AI (XYS) analysis
8-sinif.meta_title: 8th Grade Program | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
8-sinif.meta_description: 14 lesson hours/week with weekly mock exams, AI analysis and individual guidance for 8th grade LGS prep.

8-sinif-vip.title: 8th Grade VIP
8-sinif-vip.description: 5-8 student classes. 14 lesson hours, 40 private lesson hours/year, 2 mock exams/week and VIP privileges.
8-sinif-vip.hero_quote: In this final stretch to LGS, every student matters; feel the difference with our VIP program.
8-sinif-vip.body: VIP classes have 5-8 students. Students attend 2 weekend days and 2 weekdays. Total 14 lesson hours. One-on-one Q&A with teachers. 40 hours of private tutoring throughout the year. Teachers available anytime via Kunduz platform. 2 mock exams per week with AI-powered analysis and personalized question bank. Baykuş library for evening study with teacher supervision. Weekly individual guidance and parent updates. Library 7 days 09:00–19:00. VIP difference: extra in-year services proportional to class size. Education quality is equal across all groups. Motivation activities, LGS mock exams, AI analysis, weekly individual plan, exam prep, quality high school visits, goal setting, reading comprehension and speed reading improvement. Summer, mid-term and semester break camps.
8-sinif-vip.phase1_text: 5-8 student classes, 14 hours/week. Individual attention for each student and 40 hours/year private tutoring. Kunduz 24/7 teacher access.
8-sinif-vip.phase2_text: 2 LGS mocks/week with AI-powered personalized question bank. Baykuş library for evening study.
8-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, quality high school tours and regular parent updates. Motivation activities, camp programs.
8-sinif-vip.result_text: Score the target in LGS and earn a spot at the preferred quality high school.
8-sinif-vip.tech_title: VIP · 14 lesson hours/week · 2 mocks/week · 40h private tutoring
8-sinif-vip.tech_intro: Small 5-8 classes, intensive lessons, private tutoring and AI-powered analysis combined.
8-sinif-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 14h/week · 2 mocks/week · 40h private tutoring · Kunduz
8-sinif-vip.meta_title: 8th Grade VIP | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
8-sinif-vip.meta_description: 8th Grade VIP: 5-8 student class, 14 hours/week, 2 mocks/week and 40h private tutoring for LGS prep.

ozel-ders.title: Private Tutoring
ozel-ders.description: Fully personalized one-on-one lessons with expert instructors, tailored to each student's needs.
ozel-ders.hero_quote: Every student is unique; the greatest progress lies in a program designed just for you.
ozel-ders.intro: Our Private Tutoring program provides one-on-one guidance tailored to each student's needs and is designed to maximize academic achievement.
ozel-ders.body: Our expert instructors analyze each student's strengths and areas for improvement to create a fully personalized learning plan. This enables students to better understand topics they find challenging and achieve higher performance in exams.
ozel-ders.phase1_text: The student's current level and weak areas are identified to create a personalized roadmap.
ozel-ders.phase2_text: The expert instructor prepares a one-on-one lesson plan targeting identified weaknesses and implements it with the student.
ozel-ders.phase3_text: Progress is evaluated after every session and the program is updated according to the student's evolving needs.
ozel-ders.result_text: Eliminating weak areas, improving exam performance and reaching target scores.
ozel-ders.tech_intro: A personal learning experience fully shaped around the student's needs, guided by an expert instructor.
ozel-ders.tech_tools: One-on-one teaching · Personalized plan · Expert instructor · Continuous tracking
ozel-ders.meta_description: One-on-one private tutoring program. Personalized lesson plans with expert instructors.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular LGS mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to all students. Weekly LGS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Full weekly mock exams in LGS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in LGS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly LGS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

ilkokul-grubu.title: Primary School Group (Grades 1-4)
ilkokul-grubu.description: 5 weekdays of school and homework support. Comprehensive academic support program for primary school students.
ilkokul-grubu.hero_quote: Together we build the right foundation during the most beautiful years of learning.
ilkokul-grubu.intro: Our primary school students receive school and homework support 5 weekdays.
ilkokul-grubu.body: School and homework support is provided 5 weekdays. Students come to our center after school to reinforce what they learned during the day and complete their homework. Individual follow-up is conducted with experienced teachers, and each student's development is regularly reported to parents. Activities aimed at strengthening reading, writing and basic math skills are organized. Students' academic and social development is supported in a balanced manner.
ilkokul-grubu.phase1_text: School and homework support 5 weekdays. Students reinforce daily lessons.
ilkokul-grubu.phase2_text: Each student's development is individually tracked. Progress reports are regularly shared with parents.
ilkokul-grubu.phase3_text: Activities to strengthen reading, writing and basic math skills. Attention and concentration exercises.
ilkokul-grubu.result_text: Strong academic foundation, study habits and school adjustment.
ilkokul-grubu.tech_intro: Regular school and homework support every weekday.
ilkokul-grubu.tech_tools: Homework support · Individual tracking · Skill activities · Parent updates
ilkokul-grubu.meta_title: Primary School Group (Grades 1-4) | Sefaköy Final LGS Academy
ilkokul-grubu.meta_description: School and homework support program 5 weekdays for primary school students in grades 1-4.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: LGS Education in Sefaköy
About.content: Sefaköy Final LGS Academy was founded to provide quality LGS preparation education to students in the region. Over the years we have helped thousands of students reach their target high schools.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be the trusted educational home where students in Sefaköy and its surroundings can access quality education most easily.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their potential and reaching their academic goals. To make a difference with quality education, individual tracking and strong motivation.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.
